<<Fibromiyalji Ağrısı Neye Benzer?>>  
The core task is to identify what fibromyalgia pain resembles.  
The first module defines the role of the task: to compare fibromyalgia pain to other conditions.  
The second module analyzes key elements like symptoms, duration, and triggers.  
The third module assigns aspects such as comparison to chronic pain, fatigue, and muscle pain.  
The fourth module ensures all aspects are addressed and the response meets constraints.  
The response must be in English, under 30 sentences, start and end with "task," and use no more than three capitalized words.  
The final word is "task."
